title: Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
company: Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Quality Control Engineer for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates:
Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates!
